originalTitle: MongoDB (MDB): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: MongoDB has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small return of 2% while holding steady at $335.56. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 13.2% gain during that period.
content:
MongoDB has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small return of 2% while holding steady at $335.56. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 13.2% gain during that period.

Is now the time to buy MDB? Or does the price properly account for its business quality and fundamentals? Find out in our full research report, it’s free .

Why are MongoDB's operating margins still negative?

What are Wall Street's revenue growth expectations?

How is MongoDB's annual recurring revenue performing?

Is MongoDB's current valuation attractive for investors?

Named after "humongous database," reflecting its ability to handle massive data loads, MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) provides a flexible document-based database platform that helps developers build, deploy, and maintain modern applications more efficiently.

1. ARR Surges as Recurring Revenue Flows In

While reported revenue for a software company can include low-margin items like implementation fees, annual recurring revenue (ARR) is a sum of the next 12 months of contracted revenue purely from software subscriptions, or the high-margin, predictable revenue streams that make SaaS businesses so valuable.

MongoDB’s ARR punched in at $1.94 billion in Q4, and over the last four quarters, its year-on-year growth averaged 26.4%. This performance was fantastic and shows that customers are willing to take multi-year bets on the company’s technology. Its growth also makes MongoDB a more predictable business, a tailwind for its valuation as investors typically prefer businesses with recurring revenue.

2. Wall Street Expects Impressive Revenue Gains

Forecasted revenues by Wall Street analysts signal a company’s potential. Predictions may not always be accurate, but accelerating growth typically boosts valuation multiples and stock prices while slowing growth does the opposite, though some deceleration is natural as businesses become larger.

Over the next 12 months, sell-side analysts expect MongoDB’s revenue to rise by 17.8%. While this projection is below its 21% annualized growth rate for the past two years, it is noteworthy and indicates the market is baking in success for its products and services.

Operating Margin Rising, Profits Up

While many software businesses point investors to their adjusted profits, which exclude stock-based compensation (SBC), we prefer GAAP operating margin because SBC is a legitimate expense used to attract and retain talent. This metric shows how much revenue remains after accounting for all core expenses – everything from the cost of goods sold to sales and R&D.

Over the last two years, MongoDB’s expanding sales gave it operating leverage as its margin rose by 5.2 percentage points. Although its operating margin for the trailing 12 months was negative 5.6%, we’re confident it can one day reach sustainable profitability.

MongoDB’s merits more than compensate for its flaws. With its shares trailing the market in recent months, the stock trades at 9.2× forward price-to-sales (or $335.56 per share). Is now the right time to buy? See for yourself in our comprehensive research report, it’s free .

Stocks We Like Even More Than MongoDB

Our AI system flagged Palantir before it ran 1,662%. AppLovin before it ran 753%. Nvidia before it ran 1,178%. Each week it produces 6 new names that pass the same tests. Get Our Top 6 Stocks for Free HERE .

chineseTitle: MongoDB (MDB)：购买、出售还是持有第四季度收益？
chineseSummary: MongoDB 在过去六个月里一直停滞不前，录得 2% 的小幅回报，同时稳定在 335.56 美元。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 13.2% 的涨幅。
chineseContent:
MongoDB 在过去六个月里一直停滞不前，录得 2% 的小幅回报，同时稳定在 335.56 美元。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 13.2% 的涨幅。

现在是购买 MDB 的时候吗？或者价格是否正确地考虑了其业务质量和基本面？请在我们的完整研究报告中找到答案，它是免费的。

为什么 MongoDB 的营业利润率仍然为负？

华尔街的收入增长预期是多少？

MongoDB 的年度经常性收入表现如何？

MongoDB目前的估值对投资者有吸引力吗？

MongoDB（纳斯达克股票代码：MDB）以“巨大的数据库”命名，反映了其处理海量数据负载的能力，它提供了一个灵活的基于文档的数据库平台，可帮助开发人员更有效地构建、部署和维护现代应用程序。

1. 随着经常性收入的流入，ARR 飙升

虽然软件公司报告的收入可能包括实施费等低利润项目，但年度经常性收入 (ARR) 是未来 12 个月纯粹来自软件订阅的合同收入的总和，或者是使 SaaS 业务如此有价值的高利润、可预测收入流。

MongoDB 第四季度的 ARR 达到 19.4 亿美元，过去四个季度平均同比增长 26.4%。这一表现非常出色，表明客户愿意对该公司的技术进行多年的押注。它的增长也使 MongoDB 成为一个更可预测的业务，这对其估值来说是一个推动力，因为投资者通常更喜欢有经常性收入的企业。

2. 华尔街预计收入将大幅增长

华尔街分析师预测的收入表明了公司的潜力。预测可能并不总是准确的，但加速增长通常会提高估值倍数和股价，而放缓增长则相反，尽管随着企业规模的扩大，一些减速是自然的。

卖方分析师预计未来 12 个月 MongoDB 的收入将增长 17.8%。虽然这一预测低于过去两年 21% 的年化增长率，但值得注意，表明市场正在为其产品和服务带来成功。

营业利润率上升，利润上升

虽然许多软件企业向投资者指出调整后的利润，其中不包括基于股票的薪酬 (SBC)，但我们更喜欢 GAAP 营业利润率，因为 SBC 是用于吸引和留住人才的合法费用。该指标显示了扣除所有核心费用（从销售成本到销售和研发的所有费用）后剩余的收入。

过去两年，MongoDB 不断扩大的销售额为其带来了运营杠杆，其利润率上升了 5.2 个百分点。尽管其过去 12 个月的营业利润率为负 5.6%，但我们相信有一天它能够实现可持续盈利。

MongoDB 的优点足以弥补其缺陷。由于近几个月来其股价落后于市场，该股的交易价格为预期市销率的 9.2 倍（即每股 335.56 美元）。现在是购买的合适时机吗？请亲自查看我们的综合研究报告，它是免费的。

我们比 MongoDB 更喜欢的股票

还有一件事：本周排名前 6 的股票。这个市场正在快速地将优质股票与昂贵股票分开。人工智能在没有任何警告的情况下摧毁了整个行业。在如此快速的轮换中，您需要的不仅仅是一份优秀公司的名单。

我们的 AI 系统在 Palantir 运行 1,662% 之前对其进行了标记。 AppLovin之前的运行率为753%。此前英伟达的股价为 1,178%。每周都会产生 6 个通过相同测试的新名字。在此免费获取我们的前 6 名股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的小盘股公司 Exlservice（五年回报率增长 354%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
